title: poa pratensis var. maydellii
intro: Poa pratensis var. maydellii, also known as Maydell's meadowgrass, is a variety of the common meadowgrass plant, which is a type of grass native to Europe. It is used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa pratensis var. maydellii are believed to include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
